title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture South Asia Partners:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture South Asia Partners!
